title: Week 1 Practices (0703)
text:
2 Project

Create an RStudio project inside a folder with proper names (e.g. TA_Session).
Create folders for R scripts and data.
For the following questions, your code should follow the coding styles in the slides.

title: Week 1 Practices (0703)
text:
3 Assign Values
Create two variables called x and y, and assign values 12345678 and 14593. Compute x / y.

title: Week 1 Practices (0703)
text:
4 Read CSV

Download the dataset (right click here) and save it in the data folder.
Install and call the package tidyverse.
Read earthquakes.csv and save it as earthquakes_raw.
Take a look of earthquakes_raw by clicking it from Rstudio the enviornment.
